2_must_artifacts.notes: analysis.json present and non-empty. Depth=quick, so value-map.json and creator-view.md are not strictly required, but both are present and non-empty. Journal has 8 entries for this source.

3_should_artifacts.notes: Depth=quick; SHOULD artifacts apply to Standard/Deep only. findings.jsonl, summary.md, deep-read.md present anyway.

issues: repomix-output.txt not present (SHOULD for repo type)

5_content_quality.5a_notes: Creator View cites specific files: extr-srv-sample-video.py, extr-srv-sample-video-dedup.py, extr-srv-sample-video-dedup-faiss.py, extr-srv-image-extraction.py, extr-srv-transcription-s3-trigger.py, shot-analysis.py, scene-analysis.py. 7+ specific artifact citations across sections.
5_content_quality.5b_notes: Sections 1-4 and 6 read as analyst prose with connective flow. Section 5 is a candidate table (acceptable scaffolding). No PASS/FAIL banners or compliance-report tone.
5_content_quality.5c_notes: References T27 initiative and skills /website-analysis and /repo-analysis. Verified: .claude/skills/website-analysis and .claude/skills/repo-analysis both exist.

6_extractions.notes: Journal count (8) matches value-map candidate count (8). EXTRACTIONS.md section present at line 67. Sampled 3 journal entries — all required fields (schema_version, source_type, source, candidate, type, decision, decision_date, novelty, effort, relevance, tags) present.

7_cross_file.7a_notes: research-index.jsonl tracks deep-research topics, not individual analysis sources. No entry for this slug is expected; no depth mismatch possible.
7_cross_file.7b_notes: analysis.json tags=[repo, media, extraction, repository, analysis]; journal entries use domain-specific tags (media-extraction, vector-similarity, cas-relevant, etc.). Differ significantly but complementary, not contradictory.

proposed_fixes: metadata_patch: Creator View header states 'Scan: Standard' but analysis.json depth='quick' — minor drift, consider normalizing depth label or upgrading analysis.json depth if Standard-grade artifacts (value-map, creator-view, findings, deep-read) warrant it.
